channel.title: Lofree 2.4 GHz Dongle Battery Updates
channel.description: Official Sparkle updates for the Lofree 2.4 GHz Dongle Battery app.

item.title: Version 1.0.2
item.description:
Lofree Dongle Battery 1.0.2

  • Rolls up the public release fixes into one clean update.
  • Fixes the published build so the app menu matches the intended public layout.
  • Fixes Sparkle release notes rendering so the update window shows readable notes instead of page HTML.
  • Fixes Sparkle update validation by publishing appcast metadata that matches the uploaded DMG exactly.
